case_title: LIVE FIT GYM, INC. VS. DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVE FIT GYM, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIVE FIT GYM, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-07-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVE FIT GYM, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVE FIT GYM, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LIVE FIT GYM, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MARY O'BRIEN, CFO. DEFENDANT DS SERVICES OF AMERICA, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY FERNANDO RAMIREZ, REGION MANAGER. PLAINITFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.
